prompt.content:
Use the State of the Consumer 2024 McKinsey report to identify which 3 economies have the lowest customer price sensitivity index, which is calculated based on the percentage likelihood of consumers to try a different brand multiplied by the percentage of consumers changing retailers due to price discounts. State the value of the index for the 3 economies in percentage form.
State output directly in the console. State to 2 decimal places.

rubrics.name: States that the customer price sensitivity index for Japan is 4.20%... (ver_efc22de92555443598cc24d312cc784c)

messages.content: States that the customer price sensitivity index for Japan is 4.20% (acceptable range 4.16% to 4.24%).

rubrics.name: States that the customer price sensitivity index for Japan is a value other... (ver_efc22de92555443598cc24d312cc784c)

messages.content: States that the customer price sensitivity index for Japan is a value other than 4.20%.

rubrics.name: States the customer price sensitivity index for Australia is 10.23%... (ver_1a6d169a28d04785bcddd8a79d600199)

messages.content: States the customer price sensitivity index for Australia is 10.23% (acceptable range 10.13% to 10.33%).

rubrics.name: States the customer price sensitivity index for Australia is a value other... (ver_1a6d169a28d04785bcddd8a79d600199)

messages.content: States the customer price sensitivity index for Australia is a value other than 10.23%.

rubrics.name: States the customer price sensitivity index for EU-5 is 13.60% (acceptable... (ver_37d98977484d4151af3224602e045548)

messages.content: States the customer price sensitivity index for EU-5 is 13.60% (acceptable range 13.46% to 13.74%).

rubrics.name: States the customer price sensitivity index for EU-5 is a value other than... (ver_37d98977484d4151af3224602e045548)

messages.content: States the customer price sensitivity index for EU-5 is a value other than 13.60%.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
The index value for the 3 economies with the lowest customer price sensitivity index in percentage form is: 
Japan: 4.20%
Australia: 10.23% 
EU-5: 13.60%
